full_text:
Dong Xi (Yuandai) 董襲 (元代)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Xi (董襲), styledYuandai (元代), was born in Yuyao, Kuaiji. Drowned with his ship, refusing pleas to leave it. Dong Xi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Dong Xi lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
